---
title: "IQH — Projects"
---

[← IQH notes](index.html)   ·   [← Back to portal](/index.html)


The project work for **IQH** lives in its own repository.

<https://github.com/USERNAME/REPO>  *(update this URL in `Notes/_projects_github.yml`)*

*(No project README was found under this course's `projects/` directory. Add a `README.md` there and re-run `Notes/generate_listing.py`.)*
